name: Dzogchen Center
description: The Dzogchen Center, founded by Lama Surya Das, is dedicated to the practice and study of Dzogchen (the Great Perfection), the highest teaching in the Nyingma school of Tibetan Buddhism. With a main center in Cambridge, Massachusetts, and affiliated sitting groups across the US, the Dzogchen Center offers meditation retreats, study programs, and community practice opportunities. The center's approach emphasizes making the profound Dzogchen teachings accessible to Western practitioners while maintaining the integrity of the traditional lineage.
